nasb.text: in all things show yourself to be an example of good deeds, with purity in doctrine, dignified,

esv.text: Show yourself in all respects to be a model of good works, and in your teaching show integrity, dignity,

cnv.text: 無論在甚麼事上你都要顯出好行為的榜樣，在教導上要純全，要莊重，

ccb.text: 你自己要在各样的善行上做众人的榜样，在教导上要诚恳、认真、

csbs.text: 你自己要在一切事上做出美好工作的榜样；教导的时候要正直、庄重，
